title: Red Velvet Ribbon 38mm x 20yards – Burgundy Thick Velvet Ribbon for Gift Wrapping, Christmas Tree Decorations, Bows & Craft Projects (Red)
features: Luxurious Velvet Texture in Deep Burgundy：Enjoy a rich, soft-touch velvet surface with a warm sheen that adds instant luxury. The elegant wine-red colour is perfect for Christmas, weddings, or premium crafting projects.

Wide 38mm Ribbon for Stylish Creations:The 38mm (1.5 inch) width offers excellent presence on gift boxes, Christmas trees, wreaths, and larger bow designs, making your decorations stand out beautifully.

Two Rolls, 20 yards Total：Supplied as two neatly wound rolls for easy use and storage. The generous length ensures you have plenty of ribbon for multiple projects, from festive décor to year-round crafting.

Durable, Colourfast & Easy to Shape：Made from high-quality velvet that resists fraying, fading, and shedding. The sturdy structure holds its shape nicely, allowing you to craft crisp, full bows and long-lasting decorations.

Ideal for Gift Wrapping & Holiday Decorating：Perfect for Christmas tree garlands, velvet bows, hampers, floral arrangements, cake boxes, party décor, sewing projects, and DIY crafts. A versatile essential for every creator.
description: Add a touch of refined elegance to your festive décor and creative projects with this premium Burgundy Velvet Ribbon. Crafted in a deep, rich wine-red shade, this 38mm wide ribbon offers a beautifully plush texture and a soft sheen that instantly enhances any display. With a total length of 20yards across two rolls, it provides exceptional value and plenty of material for decorating Christmas trees, wrapping presents, making bows, or completing craft and DIY projects. Perfect for holiday styling, gift packaging, floral arrangements and event decorations, this thick velvet ribbon ties neatly, holds its shape well, and resists fraying. Whether you’re creating luxurious Christmas bows, adding finishing touches to hampers, or designing personalised décor for weddings and parties, this ribbon delivers timeless charm and premium quality. Versatile, durable, and beautifully presented, it’s the ideal choice for creating high-end seasonal decorations or adding a sophisticated feel to any craft creation.
